nodes.title: Bakery Business Foundations
nodes.rationale: Understand the core concepts and unique challenges of operating a bakery. This module sets the stage for all subsequent steps. Podcasts are great for learning business basics on the go.
suggested_micro_topics: Market research basics for food industry
Understanding startup costs for a bakery

nodes.title: Mastering Bakery Products & Menu Development
nodes.rationale: Develop a strong product offering that appeals to your target market. For a beginner, hands-on skill development is paramount.
suggested_micro_topics: Core baking techniques (breads, pastries, cakes, cookies)

nodes.title: Crafting Your Bakery Business Plan
nodes.rationale: A comprehensive business plan is your roadmap to success, outlining your vision, strategies, and financial projections. Essential for securing funding and staying focused.
suggested_micro_topics: Detailed market analysis and competitive landscape
Funding options for small food businesses

nodes.title: Legal, Licensing & Health Compliance
nodes.rationale: Navigate the essential legal and health regulations to ensure your bakery operates safely and legally, avoiding costly penalties.
suggested_micro_topics: Food handler permits and certifications (e.g., ServSafe)
Local zoning laws for commercial kitchens

nodes.title: Kitchen Setup & Supply Chain Management
nodes.rationale: Establish an efficient and compliant kitchen space and manage your ingredient supply effectively to maintain quality and control costs.
suggested_micro_topics: Food storage and rotation best practices

nodes.title: Marketing & Branding Your Bakery
nodes.rationale: Create a compelling brand identity and effective marketing strategies to attract and retain customers. Podcasts on small business marketing can be very insightful.
suggested_micro_topics: Developing a unique bakery brand story
Social media marketing for food businesses
Local SEO and Google My Business setup
Partnerships and collaborations (e.g., local cafes, events)

nodes.title: Financial Management & Profitability
nodes.rationale: Understand your costs, manage finances, and set pricing to ensure your bakery is profitable and sustainable.

nodes.title: Launching & Growing Your Bakery
nodes.rationale: Execute a successful launch and lay the groundwork for continuous improvement and expansion.
suggested_micro_topics: Soft launch vs. grand opening strategies
Gathering and acting on customer feedback
Exploring new product lines or sales channels

raw_output:
```json
{
  "nodes": [
    {
      "node_id": "bakery_business_foundations",
      "title": "Bakery Business Foundations",
      "rationale": "Understand the core concepts and unique challenges of operating a bakery. This module sets the stage for all subsequent steps. Podcasts are great for learning business basics on the go.",
      "prerequisites": [],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Types of bakeries (retail, wholesale, home-based)",
        "Market research basics for food industry",
        "Legal structures for small businesses",
        "Local health department regulations overview",
        "Understanding startup costs for a bakery"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "mastering_bakery_products",
      "title": "Mastering Bakery Products & Menu Development",
      "rationale": "Develop a strong product offering that appeals to your target market. For a beginner, hands-on skill development is paramount.",
      "prerequisites": [],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Core baking techniques (breads, pastries, cakes, cookies)",
        "Recipe development and standardization",
        "Ingredient sourcing and quality control",
        "Allergen management and labeling",
        "Menu design and pricing strategies"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "crafting_bakery_business_plan",
      "title": "Crafting Your Bakery Business Plan",
      "rationale": "A comprehensive business plan is your roadmap to success, outlining your vision, strategies, and financial projections. Essential for securing funding and staying focused.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "bakery_business_foundations",
        "mastering_bakery_products"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Executive summary writing",
        "Detailed market analysis and competitive landscape",
        "Marketing and sales strategy",
        "Operational plan (production, staffing)",
        "Financial projections (startup, P&L, cash flow)",
        "Funding options for small food businesses"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "legal_licensing_health",
      "title": "Legal, Licensing & Health Compliance",
      "rationale": "Navigate the essential legal and health regulations to ensure your bakery operates safely and legally, avoiding costly penalties.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "bakery_business_foundations",
        "crafting_bakery_business_plan"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Business registration and permits",
        "Food handler permits and certifications (e.g., ServSafe)",
        "Local zoning laws for commercial kitchens",
        "Food labeling requirements",
        "Business insurance essentials (liability, property)"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "kitchen_setup_supply_chain",
      "title": "Kitchen Setup & Supply Chain Management",
      "rationale": "Establish an efficient and compliant kitchen space and manage your ingredient supply effectively to maintain quality and control costs.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "crafting_bakery_business_plan",
        "legal_licensing_health"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Essential bakery equipment selection",
        "Kitchen layout and workflow optimization",
        "Supplier identification and negotiation",
        "Inventory management systems",
        "Food storage and rotation best practices"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "marketing_branding_bakery",
      "title": "Marketing & Branding Your Bakery",
      "rationale": "Create a compelling brand identity and effective marketing strategies to attract and retain customers. Podcasts on small business marketing can be very insightful.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "crafting_bakery_business_plan",
        "mastering_bakery_products"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Developing a unique bakery brand story",
        "Social media marketing for food businesses",
        "Local SEO and Google My Business setup",
        "Email marketing basics",
        "Partnerships and collaborations (e.g., local cafes, events)",
        "Photography for food products"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "financial_management_profitability",
      "title": "Financial Management & Profitability",
      "rationale": "Understand your costs, manage finances, and set pricing to ensure your bakery is profitable and sustainable.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "crafting_bakery_business_plan",
        "kitchen_setup_supply_chain"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Cost of Goods Sold (COGS) calculation",
        "Pricing strategies for baked goods",
        "Budgeting and expense tracking",
        "Basic accounting software introduction",
        "Cash flow management",
        "Understanding profit margins"
      ]
    },
    {
      "node_id": "launching_growing_bakery",
      "title": "Launching & Growing Your Bakery",
      "rationale": "Execute a successful launch and lay the groundwork for continuous improvement and expansion.",
      "prerequisites": [
        "marketing_branding_bakery",
        "financial_management_profitability",
        "kitchen_setup_supply_chain"
      ],
      "suggested_micro_topics": [
        "Soft launch vs. grand opening strategies",
        "Gathering and acting on customer feedback",
        "Building a loyal customer base",
        "Scaling production and operations",
        "Hiring and training initial staff",
        "Exploring new product lines or sales channels"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
```
